Configuration\n351\t\n352\t**Default Exclude Labels:**\n353\t- `deferred` - Beads deferred for later processing\n354\t- `human` - Beads requiring human intervention\n355\t- `blocked` - Beads blocked by dependencies\n356\t\n357\t**Split Threshold:**\n358\t- Default: 3 consecutive failures trigger bead splitting\n359\t- Configurable via `split_after_failures` parameter\n360\t\n361\t### Runtime Dependencies for Pluck\n362\t\n363\t**Bead Store Backend:**\n364\t- SQLite database (`beads.db`)\n365\t- JSONL checkpoint (`issues.jsonl`)\n366\t- Managed via `.beads/` directory\n367\t\n368\t**Required CLI:**\n369\t- `br` CLI for bead store operations\n370\t\n371\t---\n372\t\n373\t## Quick Verification Commands\n374\t\n375\t**Check Go Support:**\n428\t- Linux: x86_64 (primary target)\n429\t- macOS: ARM64 (aarch64-apple-darwin)\n430\t\n431\t**Feature Flags:**\n432\t- `otlp` (default) - OpenTelemetry/OTLP telemetry support\n433\t- `Result<T>`\n438\t- Exhaustive pattern matching (no catch-all `_`)\n439\t- Telemetry at every state transition\n440\t\n441\t---\n442\t\n443\t## ARMOR Workspace Pluck Integration\n444\t\n445\t### ARMOR Project Overview\n446\t\n447\tARMOR (Automatic Recovery and Monitoring Operations Resilience) is a Go-based project that integrates with the NEEDLE system's Pluck strand for bead-based task management.\n448\t\n449\t### ARMOR-Specific Dependencies\n450\t\n451\tIn addition to the core Pluck/NEEDLE requirements, ARMOR requires:\n452\t\n453\t**AWS SDK for Go v2:**\n454\t- `github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2` - AWS service integration\n455\t- `github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/service/s3` - S3 storage operations\n456\t- `github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/config` - AWS configuration\n457\t- `github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/credentials` - AWS credential management\n458\t\n459\t**Google Cloud Storage:**\n460\t- `github.com/kurin/blazer` - GCS operations (alternative to S3)\n461\t\n462\t**Cryptography:**\n463\t- `golang.org/x/crypto` - Cryptographic primitives\n464\t\n465\t**Concurrency:**\n466\t- `golang.org/x/sync` - Advanced synchronization primitives\n467\t\n468\t### ARMOR-Pluck Integration Points\n469\t\n470\tARMOR interacts with Pluck through:\n471\t\n472\t1. **Bead Store Access:** ARMOR uses the br CLI for bead operations\n473\t2. **Configuration Files:** `pluck-config.yaml` controls Pluck behavior in ARMOR workspace\n474\t3. **Debug Logging:** Pluck debug logs stored in `logs/pluck-debug.log`\n475\t4. **Workspace Management:** ARMOR workspace tracked in NEEDLE bead system\n476\t\n477\t### ARMOR Development Environment\n478\t\n479\t**Build Requirements:**\n480\t```bash\n481\t# Build ARMOR\n482\tgo build ./...\n483\t\n484\t# Run ARMOR with Pluck integration\n485\t./armor --workspace $(pwd)\n486\t\n487\t# Test Pluck configuration\n488\tneedle strand pluck --config pluck-config.yaml --dry-run\n489\t```\n490\t\n491\t**Testing Requirements:**\n492\t```bash\n493\t# Run ARMOR tests\n494\tgo test ./...\n495\t\n496\t# Test Pluck strand integration\n497\tneedle test pluck --workspace /home/coding/ARMOR\n498\t```\n499\t\n500\t### Installation and Setup for ARMOR\n501\t\n502\t**Prerequisites:**\n503\t\n504\t1. **Install Go 1.25.0+:**\n505\t   ```bash\n506\t   # Verify installation\n507\t   go version\n508\t   ```\n509\t\n510\t2. **Install NEEDLE/br CLI:**\n511\t   ```bash\n512\t   # From pre-built binary\n513\t   curl -fsSL ```\n526\t\n527\t**Verification:**\n528\t```bash\n529\t# Check all versions\n530\techo \"=== Core Tools ===\" && \\\n531\tgo version && \\\n532\trustc --version && \\\n533\tgit --version &&
